since_last: 57% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.08%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.66% · BTC -0.35% · Gold +0.69% · Nasdaq100 +2.73%. 57% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.08%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.08%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.79%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at +30.03%
cards.body: Leaders: SPCX +30.03%, MU +11.90%, ARM +11.49%, MRVL +9.96%, QCOM +8.42%. Laggards: ZS -3.94%, SNAP -2.98%, PANW -2.48%, CRWD -2.41%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +30.03% at $209.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +30.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
